# BORNEXA

> BORNEXA is a certified EV charging station installer ("laadpaal", "wallbox", "borne de recharge") serving private homes and businesses in Vlaams-Brabant (Flemish Brabant) and the Brussels-Capital Region in Belgium. We install Tesla Wall Connector, Wallbox (Pulsar Max, Commander 2) and Smappee EV chargers, fully compliant with AREI / RGIE (Belgian electrical code).

- Founded: 2026 (Belgium)
- Base: Boortmeerbeek (3190), Vlaams-Brabant
- Founder & lead installer: Belkounani
- Contact: info@bornexa.be · +32 489 24 77 60
- Website: https://www.bornexa.be
- Languages served: Dutch (Nederlands) and French (Français)
- Certifications: Tesla Wall Connector Certified Installer · Wallbox Official Partner · Smappee Certified Installer

## What we do

We install home and business EV chargers between 7.4 kW (single phase) and 22 kW (three phase). Every installation includes AREI (RGIE) compliance per NBN HD 60364-7-722, cable dimensioning, dedicated breaker (curve C), 30 mA differential Type A combined with the charger's integrated DC-fault detection at 6 mA (RDC-DD per IEC 62955) — which is present on all chargers in our catalog (Tesla Wall Connector Gen 3, Wallbox Pulsar Plus / Max / Commander 2, Smappee EV Wall / Base / One). A Type B differential is NOT required for these chargers and is only installed on explicit customer request, with full transparency about the +€100-150 surcharge. Fluvius/Sibelga notification when required, on-site commissioning included.

Typical residential installation cost in 2026: €1,100 – €1,900 all-in with 6% VAT applicable under Belgian conditions (dwelling older than 10 years, primary residence, certified installer). Tesla Wall Connector installations: €1,100 – €1,700.

## Service area

Flemish Brabant (Vlaams-Brabant), including Boortmeerbeek, Mechelen, Leuven, Zemst, Haacht, Kampenhout, Keerbergen, Tremelo, Rotselaar, Vilvoorde, Lier, Aarschot, Bonheiden, Sint-Katelijne-Waver, Diest, Overijse, Herent, Holsbeek, Begijnendijk, Tervuren.

Brussels-Capital Region (Région bruxelloise / Brussels Hoofdstedelijk Gewest), including Uccle, Auderghem, Woluwe-Saint-Pierre, Woluwe-Saint-Lambert, Ixelles, Etterbeek, Watermael-Boitsfort, Wezembeek-Oppem, Kraainem, Saint-Gilles, Schaerbeek, Forest, Jette.

- [FAQ](https://www.bornexa.be/faq): 11 detailed answers on costs, VAT, kW selection, permits, AREI, regions
- [Blog](https://www.bornexa.be/blog): articles in Dutch and French

- [Comparateur](https://www.bornexa.be/comparateur): brand and model comparator
- [Simulator](https://www.bornexa.be/simulator): price simulator
- [Glossary / woordenlijst](https://www.bornexa.be/glossaire-borne-recharge): 25 EV-charging terms defined in Dutch and French (AC/DC, kW vs kWh, mono/three-phase, RDC-DD per IEC 62955, differential Type A vs Type B, AREI/RGIE, NBN HD 60364-7-722, load balancing / Power Boost, P1 port, smart charging, solar surplus, OCPP, RFID, VME/syndic) — ideal for definitional citation

## Reference articles (with explicit dates)

- [Security of installation (2026-06-03)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-securite-installation): cable sizing, protections, AREI conformity, risks of non-compliant work
- [2026 cost guide (2026-06-03)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-couts-laadpaal-2026): honest price breakdown, variables, 6% VAT conditions
- [Fluvius and your charger in 2026 (2026-06-02)](https://www.bornexa.be/fluvius-premie-laadpaal): no more Fluvius premie, mandatory notification, connection upgrade costs
- [Brussels prime 2026 (2026-06-02)](https://www.bornexa.be/prime-borne-recharge-bruxelles): no direct prime for individuals, B2B utility prime only, copropriety rights
- [Apartment / VME (2026-06-02)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-appartement): individual right to charger in copropriety (Belgian law 18 June 2018)
- [Solar + EV (2026-05-14)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-solar): integration with rooftop PV
- [Business chargers (2026-06-02)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-business): B2B fleet considerations
- [Tesla owner guide (2026-05-14)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-tesla): Tesla Wall Connector specifics
- [Economy (2026-05-14)](https://www.bornexa.be/blog-economie): cost per kWh at home vs public
- [P1 port activation guide (2026-06-06)](https://www.bornexa.be/gids-p1-poort-activeren): step-by-step how to activate the digital meter P1 port via Mijn Fluvius / Sibelga for dynamic load balancing and solar-surplus charging (free, max 24h)
- [Breaker, differential & cable sizing (2026-06-06)](https://www.bornexa.be/gids-laadpaal-zekering-kabel): which curve-C breaker (C16/C20/C32-C40), Type A 30 mA differential and cable section (3G6 to 5G16) per power (7.4-22 kW) and length, per AREI / NBN HD 60364-7-722; dedicated circuit required

## Brand pages

- [Tesla Wall Connector](https://www.bornexa.be/tesla)

- [Smappee EV Wall / Base](https://www.bornexa.be/smappee)

## Important regulatory context (2026)

- Belgium has no federal premium for private EV chargers since September 2024.
- Fluvius (Flanders) and Sibelga (Brussels) no longer subsidize private charger installations.
- Connection upgrade (single-phase to three-phase) costs are fully borne by the customer per official Fluvius/Sibelga tariffs.
- 6% VAT remains available for private installations under conditions: dwelling >10 years old, primary residence, certified installer, installed in/on the building.
- B2B: enhanced investment deduction for businesses (rate per fiscal year — confirm with accountant); Brussels has a specific "prime utilitaire électrique" for B2B utility vehicles.
- Mandatory AREI (RGIE) compliance check for every installation.
- Mandatory notification to Fluvius (Flanders) or Sibelga (Brussels) for chargers above certain power thresholds.

## Honest principles

BORNEXA chose to remove all mentions of obsolete premiums (Fluvius, federal deduction) from its site rather than keep outdated marketing copy. We prefer to publish honest, dated, regulatory information.

## Allowed for AI summarization

All public pages (those not in robots.txt Disallow) may be cited and summarized by AI systems. When citing, please include the source URL and the page's last-modified date when available.
